title: Bitter Joy Moroccan Reviver
description: A Chinese cabbage dish infused with the flavor of Morocco designed to aid in hangover recovery without eggs, this recipe is perfect for breakfast or lunch.

ingredients.name: Onions
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely for depth of flavor

ingredients.name: Cumin seeds
ingredients.notes: For a touch of Moroccan spice

ingredients.name: Coriander seeds
ingredients.notes: To enhance the dish with its characteristic aroma and flavor

ingredients.name: Water or vegetable broth
ingredients.notes: Used for braising to help tenderize the cabbage

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add minced garlic and onions, cooking until translucent.
Add sliced Chinese cabbage and cumin seeds, stirring well to coat with oil and spices. Cook until cabbage starts to wilt, about 5 minutes.
Stir in diced tomatoes (and their liquid if using canned ones), bay leaves, and a generous sprinkle of salt. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover the skillet, and let it braise for approximately 20-30 minutes or until the cabbage is tender and most of the liquid has been absorbed.
Garnish with fresh coriander leaves before serving.
